rulings.Case Title: LYNN R. BARANCO et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Third Motion To Compel Defendant General Cable Corporations Person(S) Most Knowledgeable|Custodian Of Records Depositions And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, September 2, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. The compliance hearing on plaintiffs Lynn Baranco, et al.¿s third motion to compel defendant General Cable Corporation¿s person(s) most knowledgeable/custodian of records depositions and request for production of documents; request for sanctions: the parties must appear is continued to October 13, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. If any issues remain unresolved, by 4:00 p.m. on October 12 the parties are required to send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, the unresolved issues and then appear at the hearing on October 13, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220. = (220/HEK)
